allow: Bash(ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no cbi-prod "wp cache flush --path=/var/www/coffeebeans --allow-root 2>&1 | grep -v 'PHP Warning'")

Bash(ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no cbi-prod "curl -sL 'https://coffeebeanindex.com/beans/lavazza-super-crema/' | grep -c 'property=\\"og:' && curl -sL 'https://coffeebeanindex.com/beans/lavazza-super-crema/' | grep -c 'name=\\"twitter:' && curl -sL 'https://coffeebeanindex.com/beans/lavazza-super-crema/' | grep 'alt=.*Lavazza' | head -2")
Bash(ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no cbi-prod "grep -n '0 2px 12px rgba\\|0 4px 16px rgba\\|0 8px 24px rgba' /var/www/coffeebeans/wp-content/themes/coffeebeanindex/style.css")
